compare_conditions.py.change: H3 evaluation method changed from condition-level average to hypothesis-level comparison
compare_conditions.py.detail: cross-domain hypotheses directly compared to same-domain hypotheses within C2 results

toy_data.py.change: Expanded biology KG (8→12 nodes, 8→14 edges) and chemistry KG (8→12 nodes, 8→14 edges)
toy_data.py.detail: Added ProteinC, EnzymeZ, Reaction3, MetaboliteM to bio; CompoundR, CatalystL, ReactionGamma, IntermediateI to chem
toy_data.py.new_function: build_bio_chem_bridge_kg(): 15-node KG with 21 edges including 10 explicit cross-domain edges
toy_data.py.new_function_2: build_noisy_kg(noise_rate, seed): biology KG with edge deletion + label noise for H2 testing
toy_data.py.expected_impact: More cross-domain hypotheses from C2, better H1 signal

run_experiment.py.change: Added H2, H3, H4 quantitative verification
run_experiment.py.h2: run_h2_noise_robustness(): compare 30%/50% noisy KG vs clean KG
run_experiment.py.h3: evaluate_h3(): hypothesis-level cross vs same domain novelty comparison
run_experiment.py.h4: run_h4_provenance_aware(): Spearman correlation of provenance-aware vs naive vs gold standard
run_experiment.py.new_condition: C2_bridge: compose on bio_chem_bridge_kg for explicit cross-domain analysis
run_experiment.py.expected_impact: H2/H4 framework established; H3 PASS verified

conditions.C2_bridge: compose on explicit bio-chem bridge KG (new in Run 003)
